chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 833 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22-11-2022 Mr. Ghulam Shabbeer Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Ghulam Shabir Khuhro on behalf of SSP Khairpur and SIP Ameer Ali Shah on behalf of DIGP Sukkur Range..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner, after receiving copy of the comments filed by the AIGP/Legal, for Inspector General of Police, Sindh, wherein it has been admitted that if the petitioner Ali Akbar Shar qualifies all tests / interview, to be conducted by the Committee in the light of Sindh Police (Shaheed, Deceased, Invalidated or Incapacitated Quota) Recruitment Rules, 2021, his case along with other cases shall be forwarded to Home Department, Government of Sindh for final approval within a period of ninety days of recruitment process, being satisfied seeks disposal of this petition by directing the respondents to decide the case of the petitioner expeditiously in accordance with law, provided that the petitioner qualifies the requisite tests / interview to be conducted by the concerned committee. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
